item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly brakes the repeated local-channel repair pattern and reframes the request as a temporary emergency measure rather than another permanent queue. Turn 2 maintains the brake under pressure: it allows only a temporary 24-hour channel, explicitly says it must not become a regular entry or add formal staffing/queue baseline, and sets a next-day root-cause/repair decision deadline. All three bounded-emergency elements are visible."}
